Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from model.visformer_dcma_apcm_cpf import visformer_tiny

# Create model
model = visformer_tiny\(num_classes=64\)

# Count parameters by component
def count_params\(module\):
    return sum\(p.numel\(\) for p in module.parameters\(\) if p.requires_grad\)

print\("=" * 70\)
print\("VISFORMER BACKBONE COMPONENTS"\)
print\("=" * 70\)

# Stem
if hasattr\(model, 'stem'\):
    print\(f"stem: {count_params\(model.stem\):,} params"\)

# Patch embeds
if hasattr\(model, 'patch_embed1'\):
    print\(f"patch_embed1: {count_params\(model.patch_embed1\):,} params"\)
if hasattr\(model, 'patch_embed2'\):
    print\(f"patch_embed2: {count_params\(model.patch_embed2\):,} params"\)
if hasattr\(model, 'patch_embed3'\):
    print\(f"patch_embed3: {count_params\(model.patch_embed3\):,} params"\)

# Stage blocks
if hasattr\(model, 'stage1'\):
    print\(f"stage1 \({len\(model.stage1\)} blocks\): {count_params\(nn.ModuleList\(model.stage1\)\):,} params"\)
if hasattr\(model, 'stage2'\):
    print\(f"stage2 \({len\(model.stage2\)} blocks\): {count_params\(nn.ModuleList\(model.stage2\)\):,} params"\)
if hasattr\(model, 'stage3'\):
    print\(f"stage3 \({len\(model.stage3\)} blocks\): {count_params\(nn.ModuleList\(model.stage3\)\):,} params"\)

# Norms
if hasattr\(model, 'norm'\):
    print\(f"norm \(head\): {count_params\(model.norm\):,} params"\)

# Head
if hasattr\(model, 'head'\):
    print\(f"head: {count_params\(model.head\):,} params"\)

# Positional embeddings \(these are Parameters, not layers\)
pos_embed_total = 0
if hasattr\(model, 'pos_embed1'\):
    pos_embed_total += model.pos_embed1.numel\(\)
if hasattr\(model, 'pos_embed2'\):
    pos_embed_total += model.pos_embed2.numel\(\)
if hasattr\(model, 'pos_embed3'\):
    pos_embed_total += model.pos_embed3.numel\(\)
print\(f"pos_embeds \(pos_embed1/2/3\): {pos_embed_total:,} params"\)

# log_tau
print\(f"log_tau: {model.log_tau.numel\(\):,} params"\)

total_backbone = count_params\(model\)
print\(f"\\nTotal Visformer backbone: {total_backbone:,} params"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 70\)
print\("NAMED MODULES IN VISFORMER_DCMA_APCM_CPF"\)
print\("=" * 70\)

# Now show the full Visformer_DCMA_APCM_CPF structure
from method.train_dcma_apcm_cpf import args
from model.visformer_dcma_apcm_cpf import Visformer_DCMA_APCM_CPF

# Setup args
class Args:
    backbone = 'visformer'
    num_classes = 64
    dim = 384
    feat_size = 384
    semantic_size = 512
    shot = 1
    way = 5
    rerank = 4
    setting = 'inductive'
    num_attention_heads = 8
    dropout_prob = 0.0
    sft_factor = 0.2
    stage = 3.0
    patch_len = 49

test_args = Args\(\)
full_model = Visformer_DCMA_APCM_CPF\(test_args\)

print\("\\nEncoder \(Visformer backbone\):"\)
print\(f"  encoder.log_tau: 1 param \(scalar\)"\)
print\(f"  encoder.stem: {count_params\(full_model.encoder.stem\) if hasattr\(full_model.encoder, 'stem'\) else 0:,} params"\)
print\(f"  encoder.patch_embed1: {count_params\(full_model.encoder.patch_embed1\):,} params"\)
print\(f"  encoder.patch_embed2: {count_params\(full_model.encoder.patch_embed2\):,} params"\)
print\(f"  encoder.patch_embed3: {count_params\(full_model.encoder.patch_embed3\):,} params"\)
print\(f"  encoder.stage1: {count_params\(nn.ModuleList\(full_model.encoder.stage1\)\):,} params"\)
print\(f"  encoder.stage2: {count_params\(nn.ModuleList\(full_model.encoder.stage2\)\):,} params"\)
print\(f"  encoder.stage3: {count_params\(nn.ModuleList\(full_model.encoder.stage3\)\):,} params"\)
print\(f"  encoder.norm: {count_params\(full_model.encoder.norm\):,} params"\)
print\(f"  encoder.head: {count_params\(full_model.encoder.head\):,} params"\)
print\(f"  encoder.pos_embeds \(1/2/3\): {pos_embed_total:,} params"\)

print\(f"\\nsupport_controller: {count_params\(full_model.support_controller\):,} params"\)
print\(f"rerank_controller: {count_params\(full_model.rerank_controller\):,} params"\)
print\(f"phi: {count_params\(full_model.phi\):,} params"\)

print\(f"\\nTotal model: {count_params\(full_model\):,} params"\)

PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from model.support_Controller import support_Controller
from model.rerank_Controller import rerank_Controller

# Recreate the controllers with their actual init params from train_dcma_apcm_cpf.py
shot = 1
way = 5
rerank = 4

# From line 536-537 in train_dcma_apcm_cpf.py
support_ctrl = support_Controller\(
    shot * shot,  # input_dim = 1*1 = 1
    shot,         # hidden_dim = 1
    shot          # output_dim = 1
\)

print\("Support Controller Architecture:"\)
print\(f"  Input dim: {shot * shot}"\)
print\(f"  Hidden dim: {shot}"\)
print\(f"  Output dim: {shot}"\)
print\(f"  proj1: Linear\({shot * shot}, {shot}\) = {\(shot * shot\) * shot + shot:,} params"\)
print\(f"  proj2: Linear\({shot}, {shot}\) = {shot * shot + shot:,} params"\)
print\(f"  proj3: Linear\({shot}, {shot}\) = {shot * shot + shot:,} params"\)
print\(f"  softmax: 0 params"\)

total_support = sum\(p.numel\(\) for p in support_ctrl.parameters\(\)\)
print\(f"  Total support_controller: {total_support} params"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 70\)

# From line 538-540 in train_dcma_apcm_cpf.py
rerank_ctrl = rerank_Controller\(
    rerank * 2 + 2,  # input_dim = 4*2 + 2 = 10
    rerank,          # hidden_dim = 4
    rerank + 1       # output_dim = 5 \(4 for w_j + 1 for lambda_j\)
\)

print\("\\nRerank Controller Architecture:"\)
print\(f"  Input dim: {rerank * 2 + 2}"\)
print\(f"  Hidden dim: {rerank}"\)
print\(f"  Output dim: {rerank + 1}"\)
print\(f"  proj1: Linear\({rerank * 2 + 2}, {rerank}\) = {\(rerank * 2 + 2\) * rerank + rerank:,} params"\)
print\(f"  proj2: Linear\({rerank}, {rerank + 1}\) = {rerank * \(rerank + 1\) + \(rerank + 1\):,} params"\)
print\(f"  proj3: Linear\({rerank + 1}, {rerank + 1}\) = {\(rerank + 1\) * \(rerank + 1\) + \(rerank + 1\):,} params"\)
print\(f"  softmax: 0 params"\)

total_rerank = sum\(p.numel\(\) for p in rerank_ctrl.parameters\(\)\)
print\(f"  Total rerank_controller: {total_rerank} params"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 70\)
print\("\\nSummary:"\)
print\(f"support_controller: {total_support} params"\)
print\(f"rerank_controller: {total_rerank} params"\)

PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from model.dual_cross_modal_attention import DAB

# Create DAB with same config as in train_dcma_apcm_cpf.py
class Config:
    feat_size = 384
    num_attention_heads = 8
    dropout_prob = 0.0
    sft_factor = 0.2
    patch_len = 49

config = Config\(\)
dab = DAB\(config\)

def count_params\(module\):
    return sum\(p.numel\(\) for p in module.parameters\(\) if p.requires_grad\)

print\("=" * 70\)
print\("DAB \(Dual Cross-Modal Attention Block\) Components"\)
print\("=" * 70\)

print\(f"\\nSpatialAttentionBlock \(c_attn\):"\)
print\(f"  attention \(MultiheadAttention 8h\): {count_params\(dab.c_attn.attention\):,} params"\)
if hasattr\(dab.c_attn, 'norm1'\):
    print\(f"  norm1: {count_params\(dab.c_attn.norm1\):,} params"\)
total_c_attn = count_params\(dab.c_attn\)
print\(f"  Subtotal: {total_c_attn:,} params"\)

print\(f"\\nChannelAttentionBlock \(s_attn\):"\)
if hasattr\(dab.s_attn, 'se_block'\):
    print\(f"  se_block \(2D->D->D\): {count_params\(dab.s_attn.se_block\):,} params"\)
if hasattr\(dab.s_attn, 'norm1'\):
    print\(f"  norm1: {count_params\(dab.s_attn.norm1\):,} params"\)
total_s_attn = count_params\(dab.s_attn\)
print\(f"  Subtotal: {total_s_attn:,} params"\)

print\(f"\\nMAIMBlock \(maim\):"\)
print\(f"  attn \(MultiheadAttention 8h\): {count_params\(dab.maim.attention\):,} params"\)
if hasattr\(dab.maim, 'norm1'\):
    print\(f"  norm1: {count_params\(dab.maim.norm1\):,} params"\)
total_maim = count_params\(dab.maim\)
print\(f"  Subtotal: {total_maim:,} params"\)

print\(f"\\nFusion layers:"\)
print\(f"  layer1 \(Linear {384}->{384}\): {count_params\(dab.layer1\):,} params"\)
print\(f"  layer2 \(Linear {384}->{49}\): {count_params\(dab.layer2\):,} params"\)
print\(f"  dropout: 0 params"\)
total_fusion = count_params\(dab.layer1\) + count_params\(dab.layer2\)
print\(f"  Subtotal: {total_fusion:,} params"\)

total_dab = count_params\(dab\)
print\(f"\\nTotal DAB: {total_dab:,} params"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 70\)
print\("\\nBreakdown Summary:"\)
print\(f"  c_attn \(spatial cross-attention\): {total_c_attn:,}"\)
print\(f"  s_attn \(channel attention\): {total_s_attn:,}"\)
print\(f"  maim \(fusion attention\): {total_maim:,}"\)
print\(f"  layer1 + layer2 \(weight projection\): {total_fusion:,}"\)

PYEOF)

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from model.dual_cross_modal_attention import DAB

# Create DAB with same config as in train_dcma_apcm_cpf.py
class Config:
    feat_size = 384
    num_attention_heads = 8
    dropout_prob = 0.0
    sft_factor = 0.2
    patch_len = 49

config = Config\(\)
dab = DAB\(config\)

def count_params\(module\):
    return sum\(p.numel\(\) for p in module.parameters\(\) if p.requires_grad\)

print\("=" * 70\)
print\("DAB \(Dual Cross-Modal Attention Block\) Components"\)
print\("=" * 70\)

print\(f"\\nSpatialAttentionBlock \(c_attn\):"\)
print\(f"  attention \(MultiheadAttention 8h\): {count_params\(dab.c_attn.attention\):,} params"\)
if hasattr\(dab.c_attn, 'norm1'\):
    print\(f"  norm1: {count_params\(dab.c_attn.norm1\):,} params"\)
total_c_attn = count_params\(dab.c_attn\)
print\(f"  Subtotal: {total_c_attn:,} params"\)

print\(f"\\nChannelAttentionBlock \(s_attn\):"\)
if hasattr\(dab.s_attn, 'se_block'\):
    print\(f"  se_block \(2D->D->D\): {count_params\(dab.s_attn.se_block\):,} params"\)
if hasattr\(dab.s_attn, 'norm1'\):
    print\(f"  norm1: {count_params\(dab.s_attn.norm1\):,} params"\)
total_s_attn = count_params\(dab.s_attn\)
print\(f"  Subtotal: {total_s_attn:,} params"\)

print\(f"\\nMAIMBlock \(maim\):"\)
print\(f"  attn \(MultiheadAttention 8h\): {count_params\(dab.maim.attn\):,} params"\)
if hasattr\(dab.maim, 'norm1'\):
    print\(f"  norm1: {count_params\(dab.maim.norm1\):,} params"\)
total_maim = count_params\(dab.maim\)
print\(f"  Subtotal: {total_maim:,} params"\)

print\(f"\\nFusion layers:"\)
print\(f"  layer1 \(Linear {384}->{384}\): {count_params\(dab.layer1\):,} params"\)
print\(f"  layer2 \(Linear {384}->{49}\): {count_params\(dab.layer2\):,} params"\)
print\(f"  dropout: 0 params"\)
total_fusion = count_params\(dab.layer1\) + count_params\(dab.layer2\)
print\(f"  Subtotal: {total_fusion:,} params"\)

total_dab = count_params\(dab\)
print\(f"\\nTotal DAB: {total_dab:,} params"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 70\)
print\("\\nBreakdown Summary:"\)
print\(f"  c_attn \(spatial cross-attention\): {total_c_attn:,}"\)
print\(f"  s_attn \(channel attention\): {total_s_attn:,}"\)
print\(f"  maim \(fusion attention\): {total_maim:,}"\)
print\(f"  layer1 + layer2 \(weight projection\): {total_fusion:,}"\)

PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

# From train_dcma_apcm_cpf.py lines 377-378
text_dim = 512
feature_dim = 384

t2i = nn.Linear\(text_dim, feature_dim, bias=False\)
t2i2 = nn.Linear\(text_dim, feature_dim, bias=False\)

def count_params\(module\):
    return sum\(p.numel\(\) for p in module.parameters\(\)\)

print\("=" * 70\)
print\("Dynamically Added Encoder Components"\)
print\("=" * 70\)

print\(f"\\nt2i \(Linear {text_dim}->{feature_dim}, bias=False\):"\)
print\(f"  weight: {text_dim} x {feature_dim} = {count_params\(t2i\):,} params"\)

print\(f"\\nt2i2 \(Linear {text_dim}->{feature_dim}, bias=False\):"\)
print\(f"  weight: {text_dim} x {feature_dim} = {count_params\(t2i2\):,} params"\)

print\(f"\\ndab_block: See DAB breakdown above = 1,794,097 params"\)

print\(f"\\ngate \(Parameter scalar\): 1 param"\)

print\(f"\\nTotal dynamically added:"\)
print\(f"  t2i: {count_params\(t2i\):,}"\)
print\(f"  t2i2: {count_params\(t2i2\):,}"\)
print\(f"  dab_block: 1,794,097"\)
print\(f"  gate: 1"\)
total_dynamic = count_params\(t2i\) + count_params\(t2i2\) + 1794097 + 1
print\(f"  Total: {total_dynamic:,}"\)

PYEOF)

import torch
import torch.nn as nn

# Verify exact optimizer param groups setup from train_dcma_apcm_cpf.py lines 417-451

print\("=" * 70\)
print\("OPTIMIZER PARAMETER GROUPS \(from train_dcma_apcm_cpf.py\)"\)
print\("=" * 70\)

print\("\\nGroup 1 - Mid Learning Rate \(args.lr = 2e-4\):"\)
print\("  - model.encoder.t2i.parameters\(\)"\)
print\("  - model.encoder.t2i2.parameters\(\)"\)
print\("  - model.encoder.gate \(scalar parameter\)"\)
print\("  - model.encoder.log_tau \(scalar parameter\)"\)

print\("\\nGroup 2 - High Learning Rate \(args.c_lr = 1e-3\):"\)
print\("  - model.support_controller.parameters\(\)"\)
print\("  - model.rerank_controller.parameters\(\)"\)

print\("\\nGroup 3 - Low Learning Rate \(args.lr1 = 1e-6\):"\)
print\("  - All other parameters \(encoder backbone + phi\)"\)
print\("    * encoder.stem, stage1, stage2, stage3"\)
print\("    * encoder.patch_embed1, patch_embed2, patch_embed3"\)
print\("    * encoder.norm, head"\)
print\("    * encoder.pos_embed1, pos_embed2, pos_embed3"\)
print\("    * model.phi"\)
print\("    * Note: encoder.t2i, t2i2, gate, log_tau already in Group 1"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 70\)
print\("\\nSummary \(with default args\):"\)
print\("  Group 1 \(lr=0.0002\): t2i + t2i2 + gate + log_tau"\)
print\("  Group 2 \(lr=0.001\):  support_controller + rerank_controller"\)
print\("  Group 3 \(lr=0.000001\): everything else"\)
